event: isolate susceptible to all antifungal agents tested
L-AMB dose reduced to 2 mg/kg due to creatinine increase to 340 µmol/l
discharged from ICU to Gynecology and Obstetrics department
admitted to Infectious Diseases department with lumbar back pain
bone scintigraphy showed uptake around right hip, left sacroiliac joint, lower spine
MRI revealed vertebral infection at Th11–12 and L3–4
treatment with caspofungin 70 mg loading dose
fluconazole dose increased to 400 mg daily
back pain progressed during next 14 days of treatment
patient slowly improved during six weeks of treatment
continuous hemodialysis three times a week
fluconazole 600 mg after each HD for two months
low back pain radiating to right hip
readmitted to hospital with increasing back pain
CRP increased to 80 mg/l in one day
pain returned after four weeks of treatment
MRI showed progression of L3–4 destruction
combined with 5-FC 3500 mg (50 mg/kg) after each HD
bone scintigraphy showed regression of Th12-L1 uptake
high dose L-AMB (6 mg/kg) continued for 3 more months
leukocyte scintigraphy showed reduced enhancement and edema of L3–4
MRI showed reduced enhancement and edema of L3–4
gave birth to healthy child two years after transplant
